zh.Saint Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derb: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾多福利其聖 庫斯賀波也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery De Thick於1443年出生在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可時，她的父親Roger De Dethick41歲，母親Isabelle Auderbie43歲。她和Robert I Milward至少有1個兒子。她去世於1500年在英國德比夏爾伊頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾多福利其聖 庫斯賀波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset and Wiltshire): nickname from Middle English thikke ‘thick-set, stout’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery De Thick was born in 1443, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, her father, Roger De Dethick, was 41 and her mother, Isabelle Auderbie, was 43. She had at least 1 son with Robert I Milward. She died in 1500, in Eaton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in St Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery De Thick est née en 1443, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger De Dethick, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Auderbie, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Robert I Milward. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Eaton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à St Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derb: St Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery De Thick 1443 in Dethick, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger De Dethick 41 und ihre Mutter Isabelle Auderbie 43. Sie hatte mit Robert I Milward mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Eaton, Derbyshire, England und wurde in St Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery De Thick è nata il nel 1443 nel Dethick, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Roger De Dethick, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Isabelle Auderbie, aveva 43 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Robert I Milward. Morì nel 1500, nel Eaton, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a St Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Saint Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derb: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドバーイッジスト クウスバート'ス チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Margery De Thickが1443年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックで生まれた時，父Roger De Dethickは41歳，母Isabelle Auderbieは43歳であった。彼女はRobert I Milwardとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1500年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエアトンで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドバーイッジスト クウスバート'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derb: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 도버리지 스트 c스버트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margery De Thick(이)가 1443년 영국 더비실르 데스이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger De Dethick(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle Auderbie(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Robert I Milward(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 더비실르 이턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 도버리지 스트 c스버트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery De Thick nasceu em 1443, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger De Dethick, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Auderbie, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Robert I Milward. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Eaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em St Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Cuthbert's Church, Doveridge, Derb: ст кутбирт'с чурч, довиридж, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery De Thick родилась в 1443 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger De Dethick было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Auderbie, 43. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Robert I Milward. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности эатон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности ст кутбирт'с чурч, довиридж, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
